meta.description: Seeds a preview page with the block(s) under change. Customise the post_content below per PR or per branch.
meta._comment: Copy to .github/playground-blueprint.json. The playground-preview.yml workflow references it by path. The post_content is one Gutenberg block comment — replace it wholesale with whatever block markup you want previewed. HTML comments do not nest, so don't wrap an inner wp:* comment in an outer descriptive one.
